title: Nasdaq (NDAQ) Organizes Business Operation in Three Units
text: Nasdaq (NDAQ) is set to arrange its business units into three divisions, Market Platforms, Capital Access Platforms, and Anti-Financial Crime, as part of a strategic move to ramp up growth.

title: Nasdaq Announces New Corporate Structure to Accelerate Strategy
text: Organizes Nasdaq's business units into three divisions: Market Platforms, Capital Access Platforms, and Anti-Financial Crime

title: Down 50%, There Has Never Been a Better Time to Buy This Nasdaq Stock
text: In a down market, one stock, like its shoes, appears to be a bargain.

title: Nasdaq Digital Assets Foray Could Be Long-Term Plus for Asset Class
text: The recently completed Ethereum merger hasn't yet been an upside catalyst, and with another Federal Reserve rate hike on the way, the near-term outlook for digital currencies could be volatile.

title: Nasdaq is preparing to launch a crypto custody solution for institutions
text: (Kitco News) - Nasdaq is looking to establish a 40-person digital asset unit by year's end that offers a crypto custody solution for institutional investors.

title: Nasdaq to provide crypto custody for institutional investors
text: Nasdaq Inc., owner of the second largest stock exchange, is looking to provide crypto custody service to institutional investors, in its first major push into the rather nascent industry, despite a price downturn for the asset.

title: Nasdaq Pushes Into Crypto With New Custodial Service
text: Nasdaq unveils a new digital asset business in a bid to advance institutional investor participation in the cryptocurrency space.

title: 3 High-Growth Stocks to Buy If the Nasdaq Falls Again
text: These growth stocks can survive and deliver market-beating returns over the next decade.

title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest bought the dip in 27 stocks as the Nasdaq saw its worst day in 2 years
text: Cathie Wood went on a stock-buying spree on the same day the Nasdaq saw its worst day since March 2020 on fears on a jumbo Fed rate hike.

title: Delisting of Securities of Renovare Environmental, Inc.; Endo International plc; Clarus Therapeutics Holdings, Inc.; NewAge, Inc.; and Allena Pharmaceuticals, Inc. from The Nasdaq Stock Market
text: NEW YORK, Sept. 13, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Nasdaq Stock Market announced today that it will delist the common stock of Renovare Environmental, Inc. Renovare Environmental, Inc.'s common stock was suspended on June 17, 2022 and has not traded on Nasdaq since that time.

title: The Nasdaq's Struggling, But Investors Are Watching These 2 Winning Stocks
text: Some companies' backstories are strong enough to push their stocks through a bearish headwind.

title: Should You Buy the Nasdaq's 10 Worst-Performing 2022 Stocks?
text: The best performer on this list has lost three-fourths of its value this year.

title: These 2 Stocks Will Lift the Nasdaq Friday
text: Business conditions at these two companies look extraordinarily strong.
